# written_by

A book is written by one author.

Also known as: authored by, by.

## Endpoints

- From: [Book](../entities/Book.md)
- To: [Author](../entities/Author.md)

## Cardinality

many_to_one

## Reverse

`wrote` traverses from [Author](../entities/Author.md) back to [Book](../entities/Book.md).
